mapper.sql: se.id, se.work_card, se.name, se.bank_account, se.bank_name, se.department, se.administrative_office, se.station, se.employee_category, se.rank, se.technical_rank, se.skill_level, se.category, se.job, se.position, se.title, se.education, se.entry_time, se.division_contract_flag, se.lump_sum_wage, se.generation_differentiation_flag, se.base_pay, se.post_skill_salary, se.target_performance_pay, se.accessment_form, se.cost_center, se.cost_center_num, se.service_department, se.squad_leader_allowance, se.post_subsidy, se.seniority_allowance, se.one_child_subsidy, se.high_temperature_subsidy, se.safety_accumulation_award, se.personal_deductibles, se.company_deductibles, se.personal_deduct_accumulation_fund, se.company_deduct_accumulation_fund, se.transportation_allowance, se.work_flag, se.attribute1, se.attribute2, se.attribute3, se.attribute4, se.attribute5, se.attribute6, se.attribute7, se.attribute8, se.attribute9, se.attribute10, se.employee_id, se.create_time, se.create_by, se.update_time, se.update_by, se.team, se.manager_flag, se.type

${tAlias}.id as ${tAlias}_id, ${tAlias}.work_card as ${tAlias}_work_card, ${tAlias}.name as ${tAlias}_name, ${tAlias}.bank_account as ${tAlias}_bank_account, ${tAlias}.bank_name as ${tAlias}_bank_name, ${tAlias}.department as ${tAlias}_department, ${tAlias}.administrative_office as ${tAlias}_administrative_office, ${tAlias}.station as ${tAlias}_station, ${tAlias}.employee_category as ${tAlias}_employee_category, ${tAlias}.rank as ${tAlias}_rank, ${tAlias}.technical_rank as ${tAlias}_technical_rank, ${tAlias}.skill_level as ${tAlias}_skill_level, ${tAlias}.category as ${tAlias}_category, ${tAlias}.job as ${tAlias}_job, ${tAlias}.position as ${tAlias}_position, ${tAlias}.title as ${tAlias}_title, ${tAlias}.education as ${tAlias}_education, ${tAlias}.entry_time as ${tAlias}_entry_time, ${tAlias}.division_contract_flag as ${tAlias}_division_contract_flag, ${tAlias}.lump_sum_wage as ${tAlias}_lump_sum_wage, ${tAlias}.generation_differentiation_flag as ${tAlias}_generation_differentiation_flag, ${tAlias}.base_pay as ${tAlias}_base_pay, ${tAlias}.post_skill_salary as ${tAlias}_post_skill_salary, ${tAlias}.target_performance_pay as ${tAlias}_target_performance_pay, ${tAlias}.accessment_form as ${tAlias}_accessment_form, ${tAlias}.cost_center as ${tAlias}_cost_center, ${tAlias}.cost_center_num as ${tAlias}_cost_center_num, ${tAlias}.service_department as ${tAlias}_service_department, ${tAlias}.squad_leader_allowance as ${tAlias}_squad_leader_allowance, ${tAlias}.post_subsidy as ${tAlias}_post_subsidy, ${tAlias}.seniority_allowance as ${tAlias}_seniority_allowance, ${tAlias}.one_child_subsidy as ${tAlias}_one_child_subsidy, ${tAlias}.high_temperature_subsidy as ${tAlias}_high_temperature_subsidy, ${tAlias}.safety_accumulation_award as ${tAlias}_safety_accumulation_award, ${tAlias}.personal_deductibles as ${tAlias}_personal_deductibles, ${tAlias}.company_deductibles as ${tAlias}_company_deductibles, ${tAlias}.personal_deduct_accumulation_fund as ${tAlias}_personal_deduct_accumulation_fund, ${tAlias}.company_deduct_accumulation_fund as ${tAlias}_company_deduct_accumulation_fund, ${tAlias}.transportation_allowance as ${tAlias}_transportation_allowance, ${tAlias}.work_flag as ${tAlias}_work_flag, ${tAlias}.attribute1 as ${tAlias}_attribute1, ${tAlias}.attribute2 as ${tAlias}_attribute2, ${tAlias}.attribute3 as ${tAlias}_attribute3, ${tAlias}.attribute4 as ${tAlias}_attribute4, ${tAlias}.attribute5 as ${tAlias}_attribute5, ${tAlias}.attribute6 as ${tAlias}_attribute6, ${tAlias}.attribute7 as ${tAlias}_attribute7, ${tAlias}.attribute8 as ${tAlias}_attribute8, ${tAlias}.attribute9 as ${tAlias}_attribute9, ${tAlias}.attribute10 as ${tAlias}_attribute10, ${tAlias}.employee_id as ${tAlias}_employee_id, ${tAlias}.create_time as ${tAlias}_create_time, ${tAlias}.create_by as ${tAlias}_create_by, ${tAlias}.update_time as ${tAlias}_update_time, ${tAlias}.update_by as ${tAlias}_update_by, ${tAlias}.team as ${tAlias}_team, ${tAlias}.manager_flag as ${tAlias}_manager_flag, ${tAlias}.type as ${tAlias}_type

select
, (select isnull(pe.name, '') from fnd_user fu join pm_employee pe on fu.employee_id = pe.id and fu.id = se.update_by where fu.enabled_flag =1 and pe.enabled_flag = 1) as update_by_str from swm_employee se left join pm_employee pe on se.work_card=pe.work_card and pe.enabled_flag=1 left join pm_employee_job pej on pej.employee_id=pe.id and pej.enabled_flag=1 and pej.job_main_flag = 1 left join fnd_dept fd on fd.id=pej.dept_id and fd.enabled_flag=1
mapper.insert: insert into swm_employee (work_card, name, bank_account, bank_name, department, administrative_office, station, employee_category, rank, technical_rank, skill_level, category, job, position, title, education, entry_time, division_contract_flag, lump_sum_wage, generation_differentiation_flag, base_pay, post_skill_salary, target_performance_pay, accessment_form, cost_center, cost_center_num, service_department, squad_leader_allowance, post_subsidy, seniority_allowance, one_child_subsidy, high_temperature_subsidy, safety_accumulation_award, personal_deductibles, company_deductibles, personal_deduct_accumulation_fund, company_deduct_accumulation_fund, transportation_allowance, work_flag, attribute1, attribute2, attribute3, attribute4, attribute5, attribute6, attribute7, attribute8, attribute9, attribute10, employee_id, create_time, create_by, update_time, update_by, team, manager_flag,type ) values (#{workCard,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{name,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{bankAccount,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{bankName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{department,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{administrativeOffice,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{station,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{employeeCategory,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{rank,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{technicalRank,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{skillLevel,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{category,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{job,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{position,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{title,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{education,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{entryTime,jdbcType=DATE}, #{divisionContractFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, #{lumpSumWage,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{generationDifferentiationFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, #{basePay,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{postSkillSalary,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{targetPerformancePay,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{accessmentForm,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{costCenter,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{costCenterNum,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{serviceDepartment,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{squadLeaderAllowance,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{postSubsidy,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{seniorityAllowance,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{oneChildSubsidy,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{highTemperatureSubsidy,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{safetyAccumulationAward,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{personalDeductibles,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{companyDeductibles,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{personalDeductAccumulationFund,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{companyDeductAccumulationFund,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{transportationAllowance,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{workFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, #{attribute1,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{attribute2,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{attribute3,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{attribute4,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{attribute5,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{attribute6,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{attribute7,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{attribute8,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{attribute9,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{attribute10,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{employeeId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{createBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{team, jdbcType=VARCHAR} , #{managerFlag, jdbcType= BIT}, #{type, jdbcType=VARCHAR})

insert into fnd_users_roles (user_id, role_id, create_time, create_by, update_time, update_by) values((select top 1 fu.id from fnd_user fu join swm_employee se on fu.employee_id = se.employee_id and se.work_flag = 1 where se.id = #{id, jdbcType = BIGINT} and fu.enabled_flag = 1 ) ,(select fr.id from fnd_role fr where fr.permission = #{permission, jdbcType = VARCHAR}), GETDATE(), #{userId, jdbcType = BIGINT}, getdate(), #{userId, jdbcType = BIGINT})
mapper.update: update swm_employee set work_card = #{workCard,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, name = #{name,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, bank_account = #{bankAccount,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, bank_name = #{bankName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, department = #{department,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, administrative_office = #{administrativeOffice,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, station = #{station,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, employee_category = #{employeeCategory,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, rank = #{rank,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, technical_rank = #{technicalRank,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, skill_level = #{skillLevel,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, category = #{category,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, job = #{job,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, position = #{position,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, title = #{title,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, education = #{education,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, entry_time = #{entryTime,jdbcType=DATE}, division_contract_flag = #{divisionContractFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, lump_sum_wage = #{lumpSumWage,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, generation_differentiation_flag = #{generationDifferentiationFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, base_pay = #{basePay,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, post_skill_salary = #{postSkillSalary,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, target_performance_pay = #{targetPerformancePay,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, accessment_form = #{accessmentForm,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, cost_center = #{costCenter,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, cost_center_num = #{costCenterNum,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, service_department = #{serviceDepartment,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, squad_leader_allowance = #{squadLeaderAllowance,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, post_subsidy = #{postSubsidy,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, seniority_allowance = #{seniorityAllowance,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, one_child_subsidy = #{oneChildSubsidy,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, high_temperature_subsidy = #{highTemperatureSubsidy,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, safety_accumulation_award = #{safetyAccumulationAward,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, personal_deductibles = #{personalDeductibles,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, company_deductibles = #{companyDeductibles,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, personal_deduct_accumulation_fund = #{personalDeductAccumulationFund,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, company_deduct_accumulation_fund = #{companyDeductAccumulationFund,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, transportation_allowance = #{transportationAllowance,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, work_flag = #{workFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, attribute1 = #{attribute1,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, attribute2 = #{attribute2,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, attribute3 = #{attribute3,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, attribute4 = #{attribute4,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, attribute5 = #{attribute5,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, attribute6 = #{attribute6,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, attribute7 = #{attribute7,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, attribute8 = #{attribute8,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, attribute9 = #{attribute9,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, attribute10 = #{attribute10,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, employee_id = #{employeeId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, update_by = #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, team = #{team, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, manager_flag = #{managerFlag, jdbcType = BIT}, type = #{type, jdbcType = VARCHAR} where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.select: where se.id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
where se.employee_id = #{empId,jdbcType=BIGINT}
order by id
select distinct se.department from swm_employee se where se.department is not null and se.department <> '' union select '' order by 1
select distinct se.station from swm_employee se where se.station is not null and se.station <> '' union select '' order by 1
select distinct se.employee_category from swm_employee se where se.employee_category is not null and se.employee_category <> '' union select '' order by 1
select distinct se.rank from swm_employee se where se.rank is not null and se.rank <> '' union select '' order by 1
select distinct se.technical_rank from swm_employee se where se.technical_rank is not null and se.technical_rank <> '' union select '' order by 1
select distinct se.skill_level from swm_employee se where se.skill_level is not null and se.skill_level <> '' union select '' order by 1
select distinct se.category from swm_employee se where se.category is not null and se.category <> '' union select '' order by 1
select distinct se.job from swm_employee se where se.job is not null and se.job <> '' union select '' order by 1
select distinct se.position from swm_employee se where se.position is not null and se.position <> '' union select '' order by 1
select distinct se.title from swm_employee se where se.title is not null and se.title <> '' union select '' order by 1
select distinct se.education from swm_employee se where se.education is not null and se.education <> '' union select '' order by 1

select DISTINCT se.department as department, se.administrative_office as administrativeOffice from swm_employee se where se.work_flag = 1
order by 1
select DISTINCT service_department from swm_employee where work_flag = 1 and service_department is not null

select
from swm_employee se join pm_employee pe on pe.id = se.employee_id where pe.enabled_flag = 1 and pe.leave_flag = 0 and pe.id = #{employeeId,jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.update: update swm_employee set seniority_allowance = case when (datediff(month,entry_time,convert(datetime,convert(varchar(7), dateadd(mm, -1, getdate()), 120) + '-01')))/12*20 > 400 then 400 else (datediff(month,entry_time,convert(datetime,convert(varchar(7), dateadd(mm, -1, getdate()), 120) +'-01')))/12*20 end where work_flag = 1 and employee_category='02' and (administrative_office is null or administrative_office <> '设备管理室')

update se set lump_sum_wage = case when sei.lump_sum_wage is not null then sei.lump_sum_wage else se.lump_sum_wage end, post_skill_salary = case when sei.post_skill_salary is not null then sei.post_skill_salary else se.post_skill_salary end, target_performance_pay = case when sei.target_performance_pay is not null then sei.target_performance_pay else se.target_performance_pay end, base_pay = case when sei.base_pay is not null then sei.base_pay else se.base_pay end, personal_deductibles = case when sei.personal_deductibles is not null then sei.personal_deductibles else se.personal_deductibles end, company_deductibles = case when sei.company_deductibles is not null then sei.company_deductibles else se.company_deductibles end, personal_deduct_accumulation_fund = case when sei.personal_deduct_accumulation_fund is not null then sei.personal_deduct_accumulation_fund else se.personal_deduct_accumulation_fund end, company_deduct_accumulation_fund = case when sei.company_deduct_accumulation_fund is not null then sei.company_deduct_accumulation_fund else se.company_deduct_accumulation_fund end, high_temperature_subsidy = case when sei.high_temperature_subsidy is not null then sei.high_temperature_subsidy else se.high_temperature_subsidy end, post_subsidy = case when sei.post_subsidy is not null then sei.post_subsidy else se.post_subsidy end, one_child_subsidy = case when sei.one_child_subsidy is not null then sei.one_child_subsidy else se.one_child_subsidy end, transportation_allowance = case when sei.transportation_allowance is not null then sei.transportation_allowance else se.transportation_allowance end, seniority_allowance = case when sei.seniority_allowance is not null then sei.seniority_allowance else se.seniority_allowance end, safety_accumulation_award = case when sei.safety_accumulation_award is not null then sei.safety_accumulation_award else se.safety_accumulation_award end, update_by = sei.update_by, update_time = sei.update_time from swm_employee se join swm_employee_interface sei on se.employee_id = sei.employee_id AND se.work_flag = 1 AND sei.data_status='T' and sei.group_id = #{groupId, jdbcType = BIGINT}
mapper.select:
select isnull(lump_sum_wage, 0) + isnull(base_pay, 0) + isnull(post_skill_salary, 0) + isnull(target_performance_pay, 0) as from_salary, case when LEN( case when isnull(lump_sum_wage, 0) = 0 then '' else '包干工资:' + convert(varchar(14), convert(decimal(12,2), lump_sum_wage)) + ',' end + case when isnull(base_pay, 0) = 0 then '' else '基本工资:' + convert(varchar(14), convert(decimal(12,2), base_pay)) + ',' end + case when isnull(post_skill_salary, 0) = 0 then '' else '岗位技能工资:' + convert(varchar(14), convert(decimal(12,2), post_skill_salary)) + ',' end + case when isnull(target_performance_pay, 0) = 0 then '' else '目标绩效工资:' + convert(varchar(14), convert(decimal(12,2), target_performance_pay)) + ',' end ) > 0 then LEFT( ( case when isnull(lump_sum_wage, 0) = 0 then '' else '包干工资:' + convert(varchar(14), convert(decimal(12,2), lump_sum_wage)) + ',' end + case when isnull(base_pay, 0) = 0 then '' else '基本工资:' + convert(varchar(14), convert(decimal(12,2), base_pay)) + ',' end + case when isnull(post_skill_salary, 0) = 0 then '' else '岗位技能工资:' + convert(varchar(14), convert(decimal(12,2), post_skill_salary)) + ',' end + case when isnull(target_performance_pay, 0) = 0 then '' else '目标绩效工资:' + convert(varchar(14), convert(decimal(12,2), target_performance_pay)) + ',' end ), (LEN( case when isnull(lump_sum_wage, 0) = 0 then '' else '包干工资:' + convert(varchar(14), convert(decimal(12,2), lump_sum_wage)) + ',' end + case when isnull(base_pay, 0) = 0 then '' else '基本工资:' + convert(varchar(14), convert(decimal(12,2), base_pay)) + ',' end + case when isnull(post_skill_salary, 0) = 0 then '' else '岗位技能工资:' + convert(varchar(14), convert(decimal(12,2), post_skill_salary)) + ',' end + case when isnull(target_performance_pay, 0) = 0 then '' else '目标绩效工资:' + convert(varchar(14), convert(decimal(12,2), target_performance_pay)) + ',' end ) - 1) ) ELSE '' END AS from_salary_str
from swm_employee where employee_id = #{employeeId, jdbcType = BIGINT} and work_flag = 1

SELECT CASE WHEN EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM swm_floating_wage sfw WHERE sfw.enabled_flag = 1 AND sfw.frozen_flag = 0 UNION ALL SELECT 1 FROM swm_post_skill_salary spss WHERE spss.enabled_flag = 1 AND spss.frozen_flag = 0) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END

select se.id, se.work_card, se.name, se.bank_account, se.bank_name, se.department, se.administrative_office, se.station, se.employee_category, se.rank, se.technical_rank, se.skill_level, se.category, se.job, se.position, se.title, se.education, se.entry_time, se.division_contract_flag, se.lump_sum_wage, se.generation_differentiation_flag, se.base_pay, se.post_skill_salary, se.target_performance_pay, se.accessment_form, se.cost_center, se.cost_center_num, se.service_department, se.squad_leader_allowance, se.post_subsidy, se.seniority_allowance, se.one_child_subsidy, se.high_temperature_subsidy, se.safety_accumulation_award, se.personal_deductibles, se.company_deductibles, se.personal_deduct_accumulation_fund, se.company_deduct_accumulation_fund, se.transportation_allowance, se.work_flag, se.attribute1, se.attribute2, se.attribute3, se.attribute4, se.attribute5, se.attribute6, se.attribute7, se.attribute8, se.attribute9, se.attribute10, se.employee_id, se.create_time, se.create_by, se.update_time, se.update_by, se.team, se.manager_flag, se.type from swm_employee se left join pm_employee pe on pe.work_card=se.work_card where pe.id = #{employeeid,jdbcType=BIGINT} and pe.enabled_flag=1
{call msp_swm_auto_update_education_tittle()}
